subtitle.ja: 中指の構えから始めます。両手の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Japanese Opening". Release both thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、全ての糸の下を通して小指の向こう側の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pass under all the strings and pick up the far little-finger string from below.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、中指の手前の糸を超えて中指の向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the near middle-finger string and pick up the far middle-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 両手の小指の糸を外します
両手の小指で、中指の糸をこえて親指の向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, move over the middle-finger strings and pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from both thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、中指の糸を越えて小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the middle-finger strings and pick up the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指を、中指の輪に下から入れて輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the middle-finger loops and spread them apart.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかる2本の糸から、親指と中指を繋ぐ上の糸を残したまま、下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: From the two strings on each thumb, retain the upper string that runs between the thumb and middle finger and release only the lower string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指を、親指の前にある三角の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both middle fingers from above into the triangular loops in front of the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手の小指の糸を外します
両手のひらを向こうに向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Turn both palms away to complete the figure.
